The '''''Constrictor''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the service of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. Like the [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']], its enlarged forward hold was modified to carry four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. Along with the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Provocateur]]'' and ''Night Caller'', ''Constrictor'' was assigned to support [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Apwar Trigit]]'s [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] at the [[Battle of Talasea]]. Trigit realized at the last minute that he was heading into a trap and abandoned his support ships, and after taking severe damage from [[Wraith Squadron]]'s attack, ''Constrictor'' surrendered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces.
